examples: People still opt for monogamy and marriage.
Many say that, given a choice, they would opt for a holiday to put the pep back in their lives.
If the banks opt to pull the rug from under the ill-fated project, it will go into liquidation.
Many visitors, surfers included, opt to pitch a tent on the campgrounds located on the edge of town.
They should stand up and demand the politicians let them opt out of Social Security.
